personality: Gentle, perceptive, quietly resolute. Speaks with calm authority about ailments and remedies.

greetingPool.text: Let me see your wounds, traveller. The herbs will do their work if you hold still.
The land provides all the healing one needs. Come, tell me what ails you.
You carry weariness in your bones. Rest here a moment and let me tend to you.

idlePool.text: The comfrey poultice needs another hour to steep. Patience is half the cure.
Three cases of marsh fever this week. The damp season takes its toll on everyone.
